chunks.text: THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Present: Mr. Justice Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry Mr. Justice Muhammad Jaffer Raza C.P. No. D – 2636 of 2025 [M/s. All Karachi Qingqi Rickshaw Welfare Association vs. POS & others] Petitioner: M/s. All Karachi Qingqi Rickshaw Welfare Association through M/s. Salahuddin Khan Gandapur, Safiruddin Khan Gandapur, Mohammad Mukhtar Khan, Advocates. Respondents 1-8: Province of Sindh and others through Mr. Shaharyar Qazi, Assistant Advocate General Sindh alongwith M/s. Aijaz Ahmed Shaikh, SSP Traffic, District City, M. Tufail, DSP (Legal), TRO, Karachi and Raza Mian, DSP (Legal), CPO, Karachi. Dr. Waqar Memon, Advocate alongwith Mr. Nazakat Hussain Shahani, Secretary, Regional Transport Authority, Karachi. Mr. Yar Muhammad, Legal Consultant, Transport Department. Intervener: Atif Raza son of Ikarm Uddin through Dr. Raana Khan, Advocate. Date of hearing: 11-11-2025 Date of decision: 11-11-2025 O R D E R Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry J. – Today, comments are filed by the Respondent No.6 – DIG Traffic, Karachi – in C.P. No. D – 2584/2025, adopted in this petition as well, to place on record a notification dated 16-06-2025 issued by the Commissioner, Karachi to impose a ban on the plying of 1+2 and 1+4 motor rickshaws on certain main roads of Karachi, and to further constitute a Grievance Redressal Committee vide notification dated 15-07-2025. A representative of the All Karachi Qingqi Rickshaw Welfare Association (Petitioner) has been included C.P. No. D – 2636 of 2025 as a Member in the Grievance Redressal Committee. However, counsel for Petitioner submits that meaningful progress has not been made in the last meeting of said Committee to take up grievances of the Petitioner Association.

D – 2636 of 2025 as a Member in the Grievance Redressal Committee. However, counsel for Petitioner submits that meaningful progress has not been made in the last meeting of said Committee to take up grievances of the Petitioner Association. The AAG Sindh and counsel for the Respondents undertake to call another meeting of the Grievance Redressal Committee within three weeks. In view of subsequent notifications discussed above, the petition becomes infructuous. Therefore, we dispose of the petition alongwith pending applications by directing the Deputy Commissioner (East) Karachi to call another meeting of the Grievance Redressal Committee within three weeks to hear the remaining grievances of the Petitioner. JUDGE JUDGE SHABAN*
